metadata.description: Combined PTE writing topic list from Firefly available topics and ApeUni predicted topics.
metadata.prediction_rule: Y if the topic is marked predicted in Firefly or semantically matched to an ApeUni predicted topic.

topics.topic: Whether laws change people's behaviour
topics.topic_sentence: A balanced essay can argue that whether laws change people's behaviour should be evaluated through its impact on individuals, society, education, the economy, and long-term public wellbeing, rather than from only one simple advantage or disadvantage.

source.original_title: 法律改变人的行为
